Off Calendar Oct-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-21-2015 Continued To Oct-05-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Connie Yi for (petitioner) Linette Martinez.

The Court asked counsel if she had an endorsed stamped copy of a supplement with exhibit A attached. Ms. Yi stated that she is waiting for a waiver of accounting and will file everything tomorrow. The accounting petition was continued to October 5, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-30-2015 Continued To Jun-22-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Connie Yi for (executor) Linette Martinez.

The court stated that written responses to the examiner's notes are needed. Ms. Yi reported that the bond was mailed to the bank, that she is trying to get a copy of it, that a corrected Inventory & Appraisal needs to be completed, that the property is community property, that all heirs have been notified except one and that they have had mail returned and need additional time to locate that heir. The accounting petition was continued to June 22, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
